name: Chengdu Jiafaantai Education Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Chengdu Jiafaantai Education Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, production, and sale of educational information products in China. Its products include national standardization test site construction, classroom total, school resource cloud, teaching management, and wisdom based solutions; teaching recording and broadcasting systems; vehicle wireless cheating signal monitoring and analysis systems; English listening and speaking intelligent solutions; and walking class scheduling systems. The company was formerly known as Chengdu Jiafaantai Technology Co., Ltd and changed its name to Chengdu Jiafaantai Education Technology Co., Ltd. in June 2018. Chengdu Jiafaantai Education Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is based in Chengdu, China.
